subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh with truth is verily the Mother Book in the Kingdom of Command [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق بالحق انه لام الکتاب فی ملکوت الامر و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
